节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: interface of form lifecycle.

Called to return a {@link formBindingData.FormBindingData} object. The {@code Want} object must include the form ID, form name, and grid style of the form, which can be obtained from {@link formInfo#FormParam#IDENTITY_KEY}, {@link formInfo#FormParam#NAME_KEY}, and {@link formInfo#FormParam#DIMENSION_KEY}, respectively. Such form information must be managed as persistent data for further form acquisition, update, and deletion.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the detailed information for creating a {@link formBindingData#FormBindingData}.
@returns { formBindingData.FormBindingData } Returns the created {@link formBindingData#FormBindingData} object.

节点.功能描述: Called when the form provider is notified that a temporary form is successfully converted to a normal form.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form.

节点.功能描述: Called to notify the form provider to update a specified form.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form to update.

节点.功能描述: Called when the form provider receives form events from the system. object indicates form ID,and the value indicates the event type, which can be either {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_VISIBLE} or {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_INVISIBLE}. {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_VISIBLE} means that the form becomes visible, and {@link formInfo#VisibilityType#FORM_INVISIBLE} means that the form becomes invisible.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, number> } newStatus - Indicates the form events occurred. The key in the {@code Map}

节点.功能描述: Called when a specified message event defined by the form provider is triggered. This method is valid only for JS forms. provided by the client to the form provider. is used to identify the specific component on which the event is triggered.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the form on which the message event is triggered, which is
@param { string } message - Indicates the value of the {@code params} field of the message event. This parameter

节点.功能描述: Called to notify the form provider that a specified form has been deleted. Override this method if you want your application, as the form provider, to be notified of form deletion.
注释信息: @param { string } formId - Indicates the ID of the deleted form.

节点.功能描述:
Called to return a {@link FormState} object.

You must override this callback if you want this ability to return the actual form state. Otherwise, this method returns {@link FormState#DEFAULT} by default.

The description covers the bundle name, ability name, module name, form name, form dimensions.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the description of the form for which the {@link formInfo#FormState} is obtained.

节点.功能描述: interface of app lifecycle.
Called back when the state of an ability changes from BACKGROUND to INACTIVE.
Called back when an ability enters the BACKGROUND state.
Called back before an ability is destroyed.
Called back when an ability is started for initialization.
Asks a user whether to start the migration.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the user allows the migration; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the user allows the migration; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Saves the user data of a local ability generated during runtime. After the migration is triggered and the local ability is ready, this method is called when the Distributed Scheduler Service requests data from the local ability.
注释信息: @param { Object } data - Indicates the user data to save.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the data is successfully saved; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the data is successfully saved; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Called back when a local ability migration is complete.

You can define the processing logic after the migration is complete. For example, you can display a prompt to notify the user of the successful migration and then exit the local ability.

successful, and {@code -1} indicates that the migration fails.
注释信息: @param { number } result - Indicates the migration result code. The value {@code 0} indicates that the migration is

节点.功能描述: Restores the user data saved during the migration for an ability on the remote device immediately after the ability is created on the remote device. Lifecycle scheduling for the ability starts only after the user data is restored.
注释信息: @param { Object } data - Indicates the user data to restore.

节点.功能描述: Called to notify the local device when a running ability on the remote device is destroyed after a reversible migration is performed for the ability from the local device to the remote device.

This method is called when the system determines that the ability may be destroyed in an unexpected situation, for example, when the screen orientation changes or the user touches the Home key. Generally, this method is used only to save temporary states. parameter cannot be null.
注释信息: @param { PacMap } outState - Indicates the {@code PacMap} object used for storing user data and states. This

节点.功能描述: This method is called if an ability was destroyed at a certain time due to resource reclaim or was unexpectedly destroyed and the {@link #onSaveAbilityState(PacMap)} method was called to save its user data and states. Generally, this method is called after the {@link #onStart(Want)} method. parameter can not be null.
注释信息: @param { PacMap } inState - Indicates the {@code PacMap} object used for storing data and states. This

节点.功能描述: Called back when an ability enters the INACTIVE state (an ability in this state is not interactive and may change to the BACKGROUND or ACTIVE state).
Called back when an ability enters the ACTIVE state.
Called when the launch mode of an ability is set to singleton.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the new {@code want} containing information about the ability.

节点.功能描述: Called when the system has determined to trim the memory, for example, when the ability is running in the background and there is no enough memory for running as many background processes as possible.
注释信息: @param { number } level - Indicates the memory trim level, which shows the current memory usage status.

节点.功能描述: interface of service lifecycle.
Called back when an ability is started for initialization (it can be called only once in the entire lifecycle of an ability).
Called back when Service is started. incremented by 1 every time the ability is started. For example, if the ability has been started for six times.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the want of Service to start.
@param { number } startId - Indicates the number of times the Service ability has been started. {@code startId} is

节点.功能描述: Called back before an ability is destroyed.
Called back when a Service ability is first connected to an ability.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates connection information about the Service ability.
@returns { rpc.RemoteObject } Returns the proxy of the Service ability.
节点.return_description: Returns the proxy of the Service ability.

节点.功能描述: Called back when all abilities connected to a Service ability are disconnected.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates disconnection information about the Service ability.

节点.功能描述:
Called when a new client attempts to connect to a Service ability after all previous client connections to it are disconnected.

The Service ability must have been started but not been destroyed, that is, {@link #startAbility} has been called but {@link #terminateSelf} has not.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the want of the Service ability being connected.

节点.功能描述: interface of data lifecycle.

Updates one or more data records in the database. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. all data records will be updated by default. call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the database table storing the data to update.
@param { rdb.ValuesBucket } valueBucket - Indicates the data to update. This parameter can be null.
@param { dataAbility.DataAbilityPredicates } predicates - Indicates filter criteria. If this parameter is null,
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer should

节点.功能描述: Queries one or more data records in the database. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. You should define the processing logic when this parameter is null. all data records will be queried by default. should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the database table storing the data to query.
@param { Array<string> } columns - Indicates the columns to be queried, in array, for example, {"name","age"}.
@param { dataAbility.DataAbilityPredicates } predicates - Indicates filter criteria. If this parameter is null,
@param { AsyncCallback<ResultSet> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer

节点.功能描述: Deletes one or more data records. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. all data records will be deleted by default. call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the database table storing the data to delete.
@param { dataAbility.DataAbilityPredicates } predicates - Indicates filter criteria. If this parameter is null,
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer should

节点.功能描述: Converts the given {@code uri} that refer to the Data ability into a normalized URI. A normalized URI can be used across devices, persisted, backed up, and restored. It can refer to the same item in the Data ability even if the context has changed. should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the uri to normalize.
@param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer

节点.功能描述: Inserts multiple data records into the database. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the position where the data is to insert.
@param { Array<rdb.ValuesBucket> } valueBuckets - Indicates the data to insert.
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer should

节点.功能描述: Converts the given normalized {@code uri} generated by {@link #normalizeUri(uri)} into a denormalized one. The default implementation of this method returns the original uri passed to it. should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the uri to denormalize.
@param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer

节点.功能描述: Inserts a data record into the database. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the position where the data is to insert.
@param { rdb.ValuesBucket } valueBucket - Indicates the data to insert.
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer

节点.功能描述: Opens a file. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. (erasing whatever data is currently in the file), "wt" for write access that truncates any existing file,"wa" for write-only access to append to any existing data, "rw" for read and write access on any existing data, or "rwt" for read and write access that truncates any existing file. call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the path of the file to open.
@param { string } mode - Indicates the open mode, which can be "r" for read-only access, "w" for write-only access
@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer should

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the MIME type of files. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. {@code null}.

1. "*/*": Obtains all types supported by a Data ability.

2. "image/*": Obtains files whose main type is image of any subtype.

3. "*/jpg": Obtains files whose subtype is JPG of any main type. should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the path of the files to obtain.
@param { string } mimeTypeFilter - Indicates the MIME type of the files to obtain. This parameter cannot be set to
@param { AsyncCallback<Array<string>> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer

节点.功能描述: Called to carry {@code AbilityInfo} to this ability after the ability is initialized.
注释信息: @param { AbilityInfo } info - Indicates the {@code AbilityInfo} object containing information about this ability.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the MIME type matching the data specified by the URI of the Data ability. This method should be implemented by a Data ability.

Data abilities supports general data types, including text, HTML, and JPEG.

call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - Indicates the uri of the data.
@param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer should

节点.功能描述: Performs batch operations on the database. This method should be implemented by a Data ability. on the database. developer should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { Array<DataAbilityOperation> } ops - Indicates the data operation list, which can contain multiple operations
@param { AsyncCallback<Array<DataAbilityResult>> } callback - specified by framework to receive the result,

节点.功能描述: Defines a method in this Data ability (implementation depending on child classes). should call this function to return the result to framework.
注释信息: @param { string } method - Indicates the method name.
@param { string } arg - Indicates the parameter transferred by the method.
@param { PacMap } extras - Indicates the parameter transferred by the method.
@param { AsyncCallback<PacMap> } callback - function specified by framework to receive the result, developer
